title: Quark Vanilla Resource Overrides
description: A removed feature from Quark now on Vanilla
body:
![Official Quark artwork for the cancelled feature](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/VazkiiMods/QuarkWeb/a7743466b9f9eeb3a1ad0a0034a8e592e0661168/img/features/client/vanilla-resource-changes-UNUSED/render.png)

**Quark Vanilla Resource Overrides**, also known as **Quark VRO** or **QVRO**, is the port of a cancelled feature from [**Quark**](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) into a resource pack, which can be used either with Quark on Forge or purely on vanilla, mod-less Minecraft.

_For older versions, go to the [CurseForge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/quark-vro)._

_For any issues with the pack or feature requests, go [here](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/quark-vro/issues)._

### What about the chest?

Quark VRO doesn't touch the vanilla chests at all by default. Players, however, might want their normal chests to look like the Oak Chests from the Quark mod, especially in their vanilla playthroughs. **[Quark VRO - Oaken Chests](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/oaken-chests)** is an addon pack meant to be played together with the regular Quark VRO (above, in the resource pack order) that can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/oaken-chests).

### I just want the shield!

The main Quark VRO pack has a "Subtler Shields" feature, which increases visibility when holding a shield by making them appear much lower in first person, **_while leaving their appearance otherwise untouched_**. For those who want only this feature and not necessarily the rest of the pack, an addon pack, **[QVRO - Subtler Shields](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/subtler-shields)**, can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/subtler-shields). Note that, unlike with Oaken Chests, the contents of Subtler Shields are also available in the regular Quark VRO.

_All credits go to the original Quark creators, especially ViviSpook, the creator of most of the textures present in this pack, Endergy, creator of the chest textures, MushirMickeyJoe for the Bedrock piston model recreation, and Farcr, creator of the furnace bottom textures._

_Permission from Vazkii, Quark's creator, to create this resource pack is in the Gallery section._

### [Join Violet Moon's Discord!](https://discord.gg/vm)
